# Caravan

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Caravan;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Caravan { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
trailer, tow, camping, campsite, mobile home, holiday, nomadic, wilderness, outdoors

## Categories
transportation, travel, nature
